name: Arabic Bridal
description: A beautiful choice for brides who love minimal yet graceful henna. Arabic bridal designs feature flowing florals, leafy trails, and elegant spacing for a modern bridal look.
best_for: Brides who prefer simple, classy, and elegant henna.

name: Gorgeous Bridal (Heavy Work)
description: Dense floral and paisley patterns with filled areas for a rich bridal appearance. Balanced detailing keeps the hands beautifully full without extreme intricacy.
best_for: Brides who want a fuller and more decorative bridal look.
price_range: Three Quarter Hands - 3,000/-, From Elbow - 3,500/-, Upper Elbow - 5,000/-

name: Royal Bridal (Intricate Work)
description: Highly detailed line work with traditional bridal motifs. Taj Mahal patterns, peacocks, and heritage-inspired elements create a majestic bridal look.
best_for: Brides who want rich, traditional, and highly detailed bridal henna.

name: Signature Bridal (Premium Custom Design)
description: Fully customized, highly intricate bridal designs crafted around the bride's personality and wedding theme. Features premium storytelling motifs and artistic detail.
best_for: Brides who want exclusive, artistic, and premium bridal henna.

name: Arabic Non-Bridal
description: Bold flowers, leafy patterns, and flowing trails with stylish spacing. Modern, graceful, and eye-catching without feeling heavy.
best_for: Eid, engagement functions, dawats, and festive occasions.

name: Non-Bridal
description: Perfect for festivals, weddings, parties, and everyday beauty. Light and delicate designs with floral motifs, finger detailing, and minimal Arabic trails.

name: Royal Non-Bridal Henna
description: Luxurious detailed henna without choosing a bridal package. Intricate floral work and premium motifs for a rich finish.
best_for: Engagement events, family weddings, and premium henna lovers.

name: Semi-Heavy Party Henna
description: Balanced designs with moderate filling and elegant patterns for party-ready hands.
best_for: Celebrations where you want a richer look without full bridal coverage.

name: Eid Special Henna
description: Festive Arabic florals with decorative fingertips and stylish palm or backhand patterns.
